ddls:
CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* ID of the source that generated the data */,
  "reference_time" TEXT /* Reference time for the data point */,
  "air_temperature" REAL /* Air temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "height_above_ground" REAL /* Height above ground in meters */,
  "time_offset" TEXT /* Time offset from reference time */,
  "time_resolution" TEXT /* Time resolution of the data point */,
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time series this data point belongs to */,
  "performance_category" TEXT /* Performance category of the data point */,
  "exposure_category" INTEGER /* Exposure category of the data point */,
  "quality_code" INTEGER /* Quality code of the data point */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, FTP) */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., sensor, weather station) */,
  "data_validation_status" TEXT /* Status of data validation (e.g., pending, validated, rejected) */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Numeric score representing the quality of the data */,
  "data_source_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_performance_category FOREIGN KEY ("performance_category") REFERENCES performance_categories ("performance_category"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_time_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_series_id") REFERENCES time_series ("time_series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_exposure_category FOREIGN KEY ("exposure_category") REFERENCES exposure_categories ("exposure_category"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_quality_code FOREIGN KEY ("quality_code") REFERENCES quality_codes ("quality_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., sensor, weather station) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the source */,
  "source_model" TEXT /* Model of the source */,
  "source_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the source was installed */,
  "source_last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "source_status" TEXT /* Current status of the source (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series" (
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time series */,
  "time_series_name" TEXT /* Name of the time series */,
  "time_resolution" TEXT /* Time resolution of the time series */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time series */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time series */,
  "time_series_description" TEXT /* Description of the time series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_categories" (
  "performance_category" TEXT /* Performance category (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_category")
)

CREATE TABLE "exposure_categories" (
  "exposure_category" INTEGER /* Exposure category (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exposure category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exposure_category")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_codes" (
  "quality_code" INTEGER /* Quality code (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_assigned_to" INTEGER /* User ID of the person assigned to handle the alert */,
  "alert_resolution_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("alert_assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* JSON field for role permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* ID of the source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source */,
  "data_source_format" TEXT /* Format of the data source (e.g., CSV, JSON, FTP) */,
  "data_source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)
